                SelectedTarget.ConnectionString,

folder_map
            .OrderBy(kv => folder_order.GetValueOrDefault(kv.Key, 99))
            .ThenBy(kv => kv.Key, StringComparer.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
            .Select(kv => kv.Value)
            .Where(f => f.Children.Count > 0)
            .ToList
